creator: ihdavis@houston.rr.com
text:
booting the freebsd install cd produces a fatal trap 1, after listing
the ethernet address. the machine being used is a toshiba satellite
a135-s2286, the processor is an intel core duo t2060. here is the output:

..
rl0: Ethernet address: 00:16:d4:8f:9d:d8


Fatal trap 1: privileged instruction fault while in kernel mode
instruction pointer     = 0x70:0xa110
stack pointer           = 0x28:0xfd0
frame pointer           = 0x28:0xb59
code segment            = base 0xc000e51a, limit 0xffff, type 0x1b
                        = DPL 0, pres 1, def32 0, gran 0
processor eflags        = interrupt enabled, resume, IOPL = 0
current process         = 0 (swapper) 
trap number             = 1
panic: privileged instruction fault
Uptime: 1s
